lines: -  // Split on blank lines to group header + body per commit.
+  // Line-oriented parser: every line matching the conventional-commit header
+  // regex starts a new commit. Subsequent non-header lines are treated as the
+  // body of the most recent commit so a `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer can flip its
+  // breaking flag. Non-matching lines before any commit (e.g. merge commits)
-    // If the block is multi-line, the first line is the header; the rest is the body.
-      out.push({ type: type!, breaking, subject: subject!.trim() });
-      break; // only the first conventional header per block
+      out.push({ type: type!, breaking: !!bang, subject: subject!.trim() });

input.content:
name: semantic-version-bumper

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: Fixture directory under ./fixtures
        required: false
        default: case-feat

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  FIXTURE: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture || 'case-feat' }}

jobs:
  bump:
    name: Bump version from fixture
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Bun
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if ! command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
            echo "$HOME/.bun/bin" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"
            export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH"
          fi
          bun --version

      - name: Install dependencies
        shell: bash
        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile || bun install

      - name: Run unit tests
        shell: bash
        run: bun test tests/bumper.test.ts

      - name: Run version bumper against fixture
        shell: bash
        env:
          FIXTURE: ${{ env.FIXTURE }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          FIXTURE_DIR="fixtures/${FIXTURE}"
          if [ ! -d "$FIXTURE_DIR" ]; then
            echo "fixture dir not found: $FIXTURE_DIR" >&2
            exit 1
          fi
          cp "$FIXTURE_DIR/VERSION" /tmp/VERSION
          bun run src/cli.ts \
            --version-file /tmp/VERSION \
            --commits-file "$FIXTURE_DIR/commits.log" \
            --changelog /tmp/CHANGELOG.md
          echo "=== resulting VERSION file ==="
          cat /tmp/VERSION
          echo "=== resulting CHANGELOG ==="
          cat /tmp/CHANGELOG.md

name: semantic-version-bumper

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: Fixture directory under ./fixtures
        required: false
        default: case-feat

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  FIXTURE: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture || 'case-feat' }}

jobs:
  bump:
    name: Bump version from fixture
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install Bun
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if ! command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then
            curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash
            echo "$HOME/.bun/bin" >> "$GITHUB_PATH"
            export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH"
          fi
          bun --version

      - name: Install dependencies
        shell: bash
        run: bun install --frozen-lockfile || bun install

      - name: Run unit tests
        shell: bash
        run: bun test tests/bumper.test.ts

      - name: Run version bumper against fixture
        shell: bash
        env:
          FIXTURE: ${{ env.FIXTURE }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          FIXTURE_DIR="fixtures/${FIXTURE}"
          if [ ! -d "$FIXTURE_DIR" ]; then
            echo "fixture dir not found: $FIXTURE_DIR" >&2
            exit 1
          fi
          cp "$FIXTURE_DIR/VERSION" /tmp/VERSION
          bun run src/cli.ts \
            --version-file /tmp/VERSION \
            --commits-file "$FIXTURE_DIR/commits.log" \
            --changelog /tmp/CHANGELOG.md
          echo "=== resulting VERSION file ==="
          cat /tmp/VERSION
          echo "=== resulting CHANGELOG ==="
          cat /tmp/CHANGELOG.md

content.text:
All done. Summary:

**Implementation**: `src/bumper.ts` (pure lib) + `src/cli.ts` (CLI). TDD-built via `tests/bumper.test.ts` (18 unit tests).

**Workflow**: `.github/workflows/semantic-version-bumper.yml` — checkout → install bun → install deps → unit tests → bump-from-fixture. Passes `actionlint` cleanly.

**Harness**: `tests/workflow.test.ts` validates actionlint (exit 0), YAML structure, referenced paths exist, then runs `act push --rm` per fixture case (feat 1.1.0→1.2.0, fix 0.4.2→0.4.3, breaking 2.3.4→3.0.0). Each asserts exact `current=`, `bump=`, `next=` values and `Job succeeded`. Output appended to `act-result.txt` (37.7 KB, 3× "Job succeeded").

**Result**: 25/25 tests pass (`bun test`).

result:
All done. Summary:

**Implementation**: `src/bumper.ts` (pure lib) + `src/cli.ts` (CLI). TDD-built via `tests/bumper.test.ts` (18 unit tests).

**Workflow**: `.github/workflows/semantic-version-bumper.yml` — checkout → install bun → install deps → unit tests → bump-from-fixture. Passes `actionlint` cleanly.

**Harness**: `tests/workflow.test.ts` validates actionlint (exit 0), YAML structure, referenced paths exist, then runs `act push --rm` per fixture case (feat 1.1.0→1.2.0, fix 0.4.2→0.4.3, breaking 2.3.4→3.0.0). Each asserts exact `current=`, `bump=`, `next=` values and `Job succeeded`. Output appended to `act-result.txt` (37.7 KB, 3× "Job succeeded").

**Result**: 25/25 tests pass (`bun test`).
